creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are 5 consumers of py-mistune0 and 4 of them are fixed to use py-mistune0 correctly. math/sage was left untouched because of the following reasons:
- It is broken now.
- Its dependency list, including both py-mistune and py-mistune0, seems to be incorrect.

I believe the issue is fixed now.
